title: Count Number of Maximum Bitwise-OR Subsets
titleCn: 统计按位或能得到最大值的子集数目

testcases.input: nums = [3,1] Output: 2 Explanation: The maximum possible bitwise OR of a subset is 3. There are 2 subsets with a bitwise OR of 3: - [3] - [3,1]
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The maximum possible bitwise OR of a subset is 3. There are 2 subsets with a bitwise OR of 3: - [3] - [3,1]

testcases.input: nums = [2,2,2] Output: 7 Explanation: All non-empty subsets of [2,2,2] have a bitwise OR of 2. There are 23 - 1 = 7 total subsets.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: All non-empty subsets of [2,2,2] have a bitwise OR of 2. There are 23 - 1 = 7 total subsets.

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1,5] Output: 6 Explanation: The maximum possible bitwise OR of a subset is 7. There are 6 subsets with a bitwise OR of 7: - [3,5] - [3,1,5] - [3,2,5] - [3,2,1,5] - [2,5] - [2,1,5]
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The maximum possible bitwise OR of a subset is 7. There are 6 subsets with a bitwise OR of 7: - [3,5] - [3,1,5] - [3,2,5] - [3,2,1,5] - [2,5] - [2,1,5]
